incorrects.description: Student selected 30: reading the line below instead of between the lines

params.description: Leo's bar highlighted. 30 line pulses, then bar top pulses above it.

steps.text: Let's think about this together. The bar goes above the 30 line. It stops between 30 and 40.

incorrects.description: Student selected 34: close but not halfway between 30 and 40

params.description: Leo's bar highlighted. Midpoint between 30 and 40 pulses.

steps.text: You're working on it. Look at where the bar ends. It's exactly halfway between 30 and 40.

incorrects.description: Student selected 40: reading the line above instead of between the lines

params.description: Leo's bar highlighted. 40 line pulses, then bar top pulses below it.

steps.text: Here's a hint: the bar doesn't reach the 40 line. It stops between the 30 and 40 lines.

incorrects.description: Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

params.description: Leo's bar highlighted. Midpoint between 30 and 40 glows. Value 35 appears.

steps.text: Let me show you how this works. The bar ends halfway between 30 and 40. Half of 10 is 5. So 30 plus 5 equals 35. The answer is 35.
